//: Self-contained (no `extends: expo/tsconfig.base`) on purpose. Vitest's transform moved from esbuild to Oxc in Vite 8, and Oxc always resolves the nearest on-disk tsconfig — there is no `tsconfigRaw` bypass like esbuild had. The root-hoisted CI lane (`vitest run --root packages/mobile`, see .github/workflows/pr-checks.yml) runs WITHOUT installing this isolated project's node_modules, so `expo/tsconfig.base` would be unresolvable and Oxc would hard-fail with TSCONFIG_ERROR. The compilerOptions below are Expo SDK 52's tsconfig.base inlined verbatim (allowJs/esModuleInterop/jsx/lib/moduleResolution/noEmit/resolveJsonModule/skipLibCheck/target) plus this project's own strict/moduleResolution:bundler/baseUrl/paths overrides, so `tsc --noEmit` behaviour is identical while the file resolves in every lane. Re-sync with expo/tsconfig.base if the Expo SDK major is bumped.
